markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on pre-launch progress, blockers, and testing strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/BZp8aX752bWJBwmCj_5hu8F76ymrn_zx?tab=summary&timestamp=280.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Testing Focus:** Manual production testing is the top priority this week. The goal is to uncover data-specific bugs that automated tests miss, especially for edge cases like new sign-ups.](https://fathom.video/share/BZp8aX752bWJBwmCj_5hu8F76ymrn_zx?tab=summary&timestamp=307.0)
  - [**Subcategory Re-architecture:** Jose is re-architecting subcategories into a single model to fix overview charts and eliminate brand duplication. This is a key stabilization task.](https://fathom.video/share/BZp8aX752bWJBwmCj_5hu8F76ymrn_zx?tab=summary&timestamp=1037.0)
  - [**Onboarding Workaround:** Estevão implemented a workaround for onboarding: cloning existing brands to avoid blocking users during lengthy deep research. A future architecture change will eliminate the need for cloning.](https://fathom.video/share/BZp8aX752bWJBwmCj_5hu8F76ymrn_zx?tab=summary&timestamp=1562.0)
  - [**Billing & Abuse Prevention:** Estevão is writing the billing RFC. To prevent abuse (e.g., creating multiple free workspaces), the team will introduce a workspace "owner" concept, limiting free ownership to one per user.](https://fathom.video/share/BZp8aX752bWJBwmCj_5hu8F76ymrn_zx?tab=summary&timestamp=2202.0)

## Topics

### Pre-Launch Testing Strategy

  - [**Decision:** Prioritize manual production testing this week over test automation.](https://fathom.video/share/BZp8aX752bWJBwmCj_5hu8F76ymrn_zx?tab=summary&timestamp=307.0)
  - [**Rationale:** Production data is the only way to find data-specific bugs, as local syncs are incomplete.](https://fathom.video/share/BZp8aX752bWJBwmCj_5hu8F76ymrn_zx?tab=summary&timestamp=446.0)
  - [**Process:** Test critical client workspaces and edge cases (e.g., new sign-ups with no existing brand data).](https://fathom.video/share/BZp8aX752bWJBwmCj_5hu8F76ymrn_zx?tab=summary&timestamp=363.0)
  - [**Tooling:** Leo will use a shared Google Doc for the test script and results.](https://fathom.video/share/BZp8aX752bWJBwmCj_5hu8F76ymrn_zx?tab=summary&timestamp=1836.0)

### Onboarding & Subcategory Architecture

  - [**Problem:** The current subcategory model is fragmented (3 separate mechanisms), causing incorrect overview charts and requiring brand duplication.](https://fathom.video/share/BZp8aX752bWJBwmCj_5hu8F76ymrn_zx?tab=summary&timestamp=1052.0)
  - [**Solution (Jose):** Re-architect subcategories into a single, first-class model.](https://fathom.video/share/BZp8aX752bWJBwmCj_5hu8F76ymrn_zx?tab=summary&timestamp=1052.0)
      - [**Benefit 1:** Fixes overview charts by scoping data to the workspace's specific subcategorization.](https://fathom.video/share/BZp8aX752bWJBwmCj_5hu8F76ymrn_zx?tab=summary&timestamp=1088.0)
      - [**Benefit 2:** Eliminates brand duplication by making workspaces directly subcategorizable.](https://fathom.video/share/BZp8aX752bWJBwmCj_5hu8F76ymrn_zx?tab=summary&timestamp=1113.0)
  - [**Onboarding Flow (Estevão):**](https://fathom.video/share/BZp8aX752bWJBwmCj_5hu8F76ymrn_zx?tab=summary&timestamp=1542.0)
      - [**Existing Brand:** Clones the public brand profile to a private workspace brand, allowing for a fast, non-blocking onboarding.](https://fathom.video/share/BZp8aX752bWJBwmCj_5hu8F76ymrn_zx?tab=summary&timestamp=1562.0)
      - [**New Brand:** Runs deep research in the background, letting the user access the app immediately.](https://fathom.video/share/BZp8aX752bWJBwmCj_5hu8F76ymrn_zx?tab=summary&timestamp=1853.0)
  - [**Edge Case:** Onboarding a brand with no subcategory match can result in an empty workspace.](https://fathom.video/share/BZp8aX752bWJBwmCj_5hu8F76ymrn_zx?tab=summary&timestamp=1208.0)
      - [**Resolution:** Enforce subcategory selection during sign-up to prevent this.](https://fathom.video/share/BZp8aX752bWJBwmCj_5hu8F76ymrn_zx?tab=summary&timestamp=1337.0)

### Bug Fixes & Immediate Tasks

  - [**Google AI Overview Probe:** A temporary fix hides non-persisted results. Pedro will investigate the root cause (empty webhook response) on the Flow side.](https://fathom.video/share/BZp8aX752bWJBwmCj_5hu8F76ymrn_zx?tab=summary&timestamp=488.0)
  - [**Prompt Count Discrepancy:** The overview shows only *probed* prompts, not total prompts, causing confusion.](https://fathom.video/share/BZp8aX752bWJBwmCj_5hu8F76ymrn_zx?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
      - [**Decision:** Defer a UI fix to post-launch to avoid screen clutter.](https://fathom.video/share/BZp8aX752bWJBwmCj_5hu8F76ymrn_zx?tab=summary&timestamp=581.0)
  - [**Workspace Switching Bug:** Users sometimes need a hard refresh after switching workspaces.](https://fathom.video/share/BZp8aX752bWJBwmCj_5hu8F76ymrn_zx?tab=summary&timestamp=927.0)
      - [**Cause:** Likely introduced by moving the workspace ID to a cookie.](https://fathom.video/share/BZp8aX752bWJBwmCj_5hu8F76ymrn_zx?tab=summary&timestamp=927.0)
      - [**Impact:** Affects internal EMs, not a launch blocker.](https://fathom.video/share/BZp8aX752bWJBwmCj_5hu8F76ymrn_zx?tab=summary&timestamp=927.0)
  - [**Immediate Tasks (Pedro):**](https://fathom.video/share/BZp8aX752bWJBwmCj_5hu8F76ymrn_zx?tab=summary&timestamp=633.0)
      - [Investigate the Google AI probe issue.](https://fathom.video/share/BZp8aX752bWJBwmCj_5hu8F76ymrn_zx?tab=summary&timestamp=488.0)
      - [Implement "Run probes immediately" feature (\~15 min).](https://fathom.video/share/BZp8aX752bWJBwmCj_5hu8F76ymrn_zx?tab=summary&timestamp=645.0)
      - [Create an empty state for the prompt show page.](https://fathom.video/share/BZp8aX752bWJBwmCj_5hu8F76ymrn_zx?tab=summary&timestamp=645.0)

### Billing, User Management & MarTech

  - [**Billing RFC:** Estevão is writing the Request for Comments for the billing system.](https://fathom.video/share/BZp8aX752bWJBwmCj_5hu8F76ymrn_zx?tab=summary&timestamp=1478.0)
  - [**Abuse Prevention:** To prevent users from creating multiple free workspaces, the team will introduce a workspace "owner" concept.](https://fathom.video/share/BZp8aX752bWJBwmCj_5hu8F76ymrn_zx?tab=summary&timestamp=2202.0)
      - [**Rule:** One free workspace ownership per user.](https://fathom.video/share/BZp8aX752bWJBwmCj_5hu8F76ymrn_zx?tab=summary&timestamp=2282.0)
      - [**Implementation:** Add an `owner` boolean to the `enrollment` model.](https://fathom.video/share/BZp8aX752bWJBwmCj_5hu8F76ymrn_zx?tab=summary&timestamp=2295.0)
  - [**Audit Trail:** An audit trail (using PaperTrail) is a post-launch priority.](https://fathom.video/share/BZp8aX752bWJBwmCj_5hu8F76ymrn_zx?tab=summary&timestamp=2523.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Crucial for support and GDPR compliance.](https://fathom.video/share/BZp8aX752bWJBwmCj_5hu8F76ymrn_zx?tab=summary&timestamp=2523.0)
  - [**MarTech Stack (Daniel):**](https://fathom.video/share/BZp8aX752bWJBwmCj_5hu8F76ymrn_zx?tab=summary&timestamp=2015.0)
      - [**Data Layer:** Evaluate Segment vs. RudderStack.](https://fathom.video/share/BZp8aX752bWJBwmCj_5hu8F76ymrn_zx?tab=summary&timestamp=2015.0)
      - [**Email Nurturing:** Evaluate Customer.io vs. HubSpot.](https://fathom.video/share/BZp8aX752bWJBwmCj_5hu8F76ymrn_zx?tab=summary&timestamp=2015.0)
          - [**Requirement:** Event-based nurturing (e.g., user action triggers email flow).](https://fathom.video/share/BZp8aX752bWJBwmCj_5hu8F76ymrn_zx?tab=summary&timestamp=2180.0)
          - [**Action:** Stevie to sync with Jason on HubSpot's capabilities.](https://fathom.video/share/BZp8aX752bWJBwmCj_5hu8F76ymrn_zx?tab=summary&timestamp=2064.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Leo:**](https://fathom.video/share/BZp8aX752bWJBwmCj_5hu8F76ymrn_zx?tab=summary&timestamp=2700.0)
      - [Upload the test script to a shared Google Doc.](https://fathom.video/share/BZp8aX752bWJBwmCj_5hu8F76ymrn_zx?tab=summary&timestamp=1836.0)
      - [Triage and assign bugs in Linear to the appropriate milestones.](https://fathom.video/share/BZp8aX752bWJBwmCj_5hu8F76ymrn_zx?tab=summary&timestamp=2769.0)
  - [**Pedro:**](https://fathom.video/share/BZp8aX752bWJBwmCj_5hu8F76ymrn_zx?tab=summary&timestamp=633.0)
      - [Investigate the Google AI probe issue on the Flow side.](https://fathom.video/share/BZp8aX752bWJBwmCj_5hu8F76ymrn_zx?tab=summary&timestamp=488.0)
      - [Implement "Run probes immediately" and the prompt show page empty state.](https://fathom.video/share/BZp8aX752bWJBwmCj_5hu8F76ymrn_zx?tab=summary&timestamp=645.0)

  - [**Jose:**](https://fathom.video/share/BZp8aX752bWJBwmCj_5hu8F76ymrn_zx?tab=summary&timestamp=1001.0)
      - [Continue work on the subcategory re-architecture.](https://fathom.video/share/BZp8aX752bWJBwmCj_5hu8F76ymrn_zx?tab=summary&timestamp=1037.0)
  - [**Estevão:**](https://fathom.video/share/BZp8aX752bWJBwmCj_5hu8F76ymrn_zx?tab=summary&timestamp=1465.0)
      - [Share the billing RFC for review.](https://fathom.video/share/BZp8aX752bWJBwmCj_5hu8F76ymrn_zx?tab=summary&timestamp=1478.0)
      - [Begin work on the billing system tomorrow.](https://fathom.video/share/BZp8aX752bWJBwmCj_5hu8F76ymrn_zx?tab=summary&timestamp=1511.0)
  - [**Stevie:**](https://fathom.video/share/BZp8aX752bWJBwmCj_5hu8F76ymrn_zx?tab=summary&timestamp=2064.0)
      - [Sync with Jason on HubSpot's email nurturing capabilities.](https://fathom.video/share/BZp8aX752bWJBwmCj_5hu8F76ymrn_zx?tab=summary&timestamp=2064.0)
      - [Update the "Add user to workspace" ticket to include the "owner" concept.](https://fathom.video/share/BZp8aX752bWJBwmCj_5hu8F76ymrn_zx?tab=summary&timestamp=2378.0)
  - [**Daniel:**](https://fathom.video/share/BZp8aX752bWJBwmCj_5hu8F76ymrn_zx?tab=summary&timestamp=1909.0)
      - [Create a ticket for the workspace switching bug.](https://fathom.video/share/BZp8aX752bWJBwmCj_5hu8F76ymrn_zx?tab=summary&timestamp=927.0)
      - [Create a post-launch ticket for the audit trail.](https://fathom.video/share/BZp8aX752bWJBwmCj_5hu8F76ymrn_zx?tab=summary&timestamp=2523.0)
  - [**All:**](https://fathom.video/share/BZp8aX752bWJBwmCj_5hu8F76ymrn_zx?tab=summary&timestamp=2724.0)
      - [Begin manual production testing, focusing on critical clients and edge cases.](https://fathom.video/share/BZp8aX752bWJBwmCj_5hu8F76ymrn_zx?tab=summary&timestamp=2724.0)
